diagrams.title: Framework Activities Flow
diagrams.description: Linear progression showing five framework activities from Communication to Deployment
diagrams.purpose: Shows the sequential nature of framework activities and how each feeds into the next

diagrams.title: Modeling Components
diagrams.description: Detailed breakdown of Modeling activity into Analysis and Design layers
elements: Bottom layer: Analysis Model (Requirements, Use Cases)
Top layer: Design Model (Architecture, Database Design, Interface Design)
diagrams.purpose: Clarifies that Modeling has two distinct but related components

diagrams.title: Construction Activity Breakdown
diagrams.description: Shows what happens during the Construction framework activity
elements: All feeding into Final Software Build
diagrams.purpose: Helps understand that Construction is not just coding but includes testing at multiple levels

diagrams.title: Planning Activity Components
diagrams.description: Detailed view of what Planning activity encompasses
diagrams.purpose: Shows that Planning involves more than just scheduling - it includes estimation and risk handling

visuals.title: Principles That Guide Each Framework Activity
visuals.description: Visual diagram for principles that guide each framework activity
